name: colab-ssh
description: Operate Google Colab from Codex with Google's official CLI, plus an SSH fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Provision and control authorized Colab runtimes.
interface.longDescription: Uses Google's official Colab CLI through WSL2 for supported provisioning, execution, files, logs, and keep-alive, with a secure short-lived SSH fallback for exceptional cases.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $operate-colab-ssh to provision and operate my authorized Google Colab runtime with the official Colab CLI.
